title: household_observation/v2 payload
description: Ship-3 deployer shape evolution. v2 = v1 + one additive optional field (head_of_household_phone) + one deprecation (visit_notes). Identity-key fields (village_ref, household_name) preserved verbatim per Ship-3 §6.1 sub-decision 2 (FP-009 closure assertion). Default change class CF-1 (deprecation-only) per ADR-004 §S10. v1 events remain valid forever; v2 is registered alongside v1.

head_of_household_phone.description: v2 additive field — optional phone number for the head of household. Free-form for now; pattern validation deferred to a later evolution.

village_ref.description: UUID of the village this household is in. Identity-key field — name preserved verbatim from v1 to keep ConflictDetector field-name lookup working unchanged across versions (FP-009).

visit_notes.description: DEPRECATED in v2 (CF-1 deprecation per ADR-004 §S10). Free-form text intended to be superseded by structured observation fields in a future shape version. Still accepted for backward compatibility; new captures should leave it null.
